codeSamples.code:
env:
  contexts:
    - name: target
      urls:
        - https://www.example.com
      includePaths: []
      excludePaths: []
      authentication:
        method: manual
  vars:
    env: dev
jobs:
  - type: spider
  - type: activeScan

title: Automated Retesting (Part 4)
summary: Apply automated retesting in real ZAP workflows with guided steps, examples, and practice.
content:
# Automated Retesting (Part 4)

## Overview
Apply automated retesting in real ZAP workflows with guided steps, examples, and practice.

## Key ideas
- Keep scope explicit before running scans.
- Prefer safe defaults when testing new targets.
- Capture evidence for every significant finding.

## Workflow
1. Define scope and choose the right mode.
2. Run the scan or action for this topic.
3. Review alerts and validate results.

## What to watch for
- Out-of-scope requests or unexpected targets.
- Missing coverage in dynamic sections.
- False positives that need manual validation.
examples: Run automated retesting on a staging target and compare alerts.
Document one alert with evidence and remediation notes.
objectives: Explain how automated retesting fits into ZAP testing.
Configure automated retesting safely for your target.
